name: Asymmetrical Mixed Christmas Wreath - Threshold™
description:
Embrace the holiday spirit with this Asymmetrical Holiday Wreath from Threshold™. This wreath features faux pine needles and red berries for a nature-inspired look and is accented by a red bow for seasonal charm. Designed in a circular shape, you can hang this decorative wreath above the mantel or on any wall for a touch of festive flair.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
